Nature of Husband
When a girl's horoscope is presented to you for examination,
you can have a fair idea as to what kind of a boy she is going
to get for a husband. Of course you have already learnt the
general rules regarding this in the previous chapter. Here a
few more details are given for the benefit of students : —
(i) If the 7th house is devoid of strength and planets and is
aspected by malefics and not by benefics. the girl will have a
wretched fellow for a husband.
(ii) If the 7th house be occupied by Mercury and
Saturn or owned by either of them, the husband would be
impotent.
(iiiV If the 7th house be a movable Sign and its lord in a
movable Sign or Arhsa, her husband would always be away
from home.
(iv) If the Sun be there in his own Amsa or Sign the husband
would be gentle in his sexual activities.
